name: Lapointe
description: Lapointe (ラポワント Rapowanto) served as a Cardinal of the Zentopia Church.  Lapointe has the same personalities as Brain, of saying pilgrims as maggots and he was very cold and strict. He does not tolerate opposition in any way and requires total loyalty. When a Zentopia priest who refused to reveal the identity of Will Neville's disciples as he threw him in prison and tortured him. He does not recognize any authority besides his own, and even challenges the Magic Council when he haughtily dismisses Lahar's inquiries, stating that the escape of Oración Seis lay solely at the feet of the Council, and that it was outrageous for Lahar to insinuate that Zentopia had something to do with it.   ~!Lapointe was a doll used by Reborn Oración Seis to accomplish their plans, possessing a strand of hair from Brain.!~
